body_excerpt: In multiple locations, there is a possible way to use a paired Bluetooth LE audio device to achieve code execution due to a use after free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
